# aiwatcher-mcp

AI news ingestion, distillation, and alert system. FastMCP 3.2 fleet server.

## Purpose

Polls 10+ AI news RSS feeds and Alpha Signal emails, scores items with Claude
using a Sandra-persona system prompt (relevance + urgency 0–10), generates
daily HTML digests for Sandra and Steve, and fires TTS wake-up alerts via
robofang + speechops for critical breaking events (acquisitions, major model
releases, security incidents).

## Tools

- `poll_feeds` — fetch all enabled RSS/Atom feeds for new items
- `distill_pending` — score unprocessed items with Claude
- `check_alerts` — fire robofang + TTS for critical items
- `generate_digest` — build HTML+text digest from scored items
- `send_digest_now` — force-send digest email to Sandra and Steve
- `get_top_items(hours, limit)` — top items sorted by urgency
- `get_feeds_list` — list all feeds with status
- `add_feed(name, url)` — add a new RSS/Atom source
- `show_dashboard_card` — Prefab UI stats card

## Prompts

- `breaking_news_brief` — verbal brief of last 2 hours
- `portfolio_impact_analysis` — portfolio impact assessment prompt

## Resources

- `aiwatcher://feeds/list` — JSON list of all feeds
- `aiwatcher://stats` — current DB statistics

## Configuration

Copy `.env.example` to `.env`. Required: `ANTHROPIC_API_KEY`.
Optional integrations: `ROBOFANG_ENABLED`, `EMAIL_ENABLED`, `CALIBRE_ENABLED`, `GMAIL_ENABLED`.

## Ports

Backend: 10946 | Frontend: 10947 | MCP: http://localhost:10946/mcp

## Start

```
.\start.bat
```
